name: supportapp
description: The Support App is developed by Root3, specialized in managing Apple devices. Root3 offers consultancy and support for organizations to get the most out of their Apple devices and is based in The Netherlands (Halfweg).
description_ja: Support App はオランダ（Halfweg）を拠点とする Apple デバイス管理専門企業 Root3 が開発。組織が Apple デバイスを最大限に活用できるようコンサルティングとサポートを提供する
